step1.hintRole: Tell us a bit about what you do.

step2.intro: Got any data you'd like to bring in?
step2.introSub: If you do, we'll go through it together and get it into the system — if not, we'll keep going, one small step at a time :)
step2.pathASub: CSV or Excel — you can drop in several files at once. We'll detect the columns, and you'll always review everything before anything is saved.
step2.pathBSub: No problem — we'll build it all together, step by step, at your own pace.
step2.filePickerAria: Choose a CSV or Excel file to import
step2.readNote: We've only read the file — nothing is saved yet. In the next step you'll review it all and approve.
step2.noData: We read the file but didn't find any data to import. If this is the right file, try exporting it again as CSV — or we can keep going from scratch.
step2.truncated: Some tables were trimmed to the first {{cap}} rows to keep things fast. You can import the rest separately later.
step2.errUnsupported: That format can't be imported. You can bring in CSV or Excel (xlsx/xls) — if your file is in Numbers or Google Sheets, export it to CSV and try again.
step2.errReadFail: We couldn't read the file — {{verb}} it's a valid CSV or Excel and isn't open in another app right now, or you can just start fresh.
step2.errNoEntities: We read the file but couldn't find any clients, projects, or transactions in it. Check that each table's type is right and that the name/amount column is mapped — or choose "start fresh".
step2.hintYearMissing: Pick a year for each monthly table before continuing.

step3.introSub: A project can hold clients, tasks, reminders, income — and just about anything else you {{verb}}.
step3.existingBanner: You already have {{count}} projects. Adding one here just creates another.
step3.csvTitle: The project column from your file
step3.groupsEmpty: No groups yet. You can add a cohort or workshop — or skip and keep going one-on-one.
step3.clientsTeaser: In the next step we'll add clients — and {{verb}} to link them to this project.

step4.title: Add your first clients
step4.fromFileLabel: From your file — {{verb}} a client to fill in the fields
step4.hintAddOne: Add at least one client, or skip.

step5.intro: Any questions {{verb}} us to ask you every day?
step5.introSub: Pick from our suggestions and add your own — and you can always change, add, or turn them off later.
step5.customPlaceholder: e.g. How {{adj}} did you feel today?

step6.intro: Shall we set a first goal?
step6.introSub: {{verb}} to track your progress — and you can always add, edit, or remove goals with ease.
step6.personalHint: Learning, creating, running — whatever you measure
step6.goalNamePlaceholder: e.g. 5 hours of learning a week
step6.importanceHint: This affects how your overall progress percentage is calculated.
step6.manualHint: You'll log progress manually from the home screen.
step6.questionHint: We'll create a daily question — slider or yes/no — that connects to this goal.
step6.questionPlaceholderScale: e.g. How long did you study today?
step6.targetHelpYesNo: On how many days you'll {{verb}} "yes" over the period. The question appears about {{max}} times — you can aim for fewer, not more.
step6.targetHelpQuestion: The sum of all your answers over the period (e.g. total hours studied).
step6.targetHelpPersonal: The total you'll {{verb}} over the period from all your manual entries.
step6.scheduleWarnOver: The target ({{target}}) is higher than the number of times the question appears ({{max}}). {{verb}} the target.
step6.hintOverMax: The target is higher than the number of days the question appears ({{max}}).

step7.intro: If you have recurring transactions — this is the place
step7.introSub: Recurring expenses and income are factored into your cash flow every month — and {{verb}} to cancel, add, or edit them with ease.

step8.title: Overview
step8.explain: This percentage is calculated from all your goals and how important each one is — it's meant to help you keep a healthy pace and stay in steady touch with your goals.
step8.nothingToFill: Nothing to fill in here — we just wanted to show you.

step9.title: You're all set! Everything's ready
step9.savedNote: It's all saved already — {{verb}} add, edit, or remove anything anytime from the home screen.
step9.emptyNote: You can add clients, goals, tasks, and everything else — easily from the home screen, {{verb}}.
step9.about1: This system is being built for you — to make running your business as easy and as nourishing as possible.
step9.about2: {{verb}} send us feedback, requests, and refinements from the home screen and the menu, so the system can shape itself even more around you.
step9.about3: We care about you — so {{allow}} yourself to act {{like}} and ask for anything you {{wish}}.
step9.about4: We more than hope Simplicity becomes a warm home for your business — and we wish you full, fulfilling success.
